name: A difficult diplomatic situation
description:
(Artist)

Unification of the northern lands

During a prolonged period of dormancy caused by heightened weather conditions, the North turned inward, engaging in conflict with itself. This internal strife allowed the region’s interior to be united under the influence of Alice. Through her exceptional negotiation skills and business acumen, Alice persuaded the warlords to place their faith in her leadership.

When the frigid winter finally ended the following year, and the frost retreated from the lands south of the barren tundras, Alice—now the unofficial Empress of the Nordikaans—shifted her focus to the southern kingdoms. These kingdoms had developed a pattern of harassing the northern lands every spring and summer, though they had been unable to do so for the past two years due to the unusually long winters.

Now united, Alice proclaimed her ambition to conquer as far as her armies could reach, declaring that a true empire would be forged under her rule.

Archaic arts

Swords and shields aren’t the only means of battle. Archaic arts allow individuals to manipulate their surroundings or even themselves, offering a vast range of methods to gain specific insights. The most potent among these arts comes from being blessed by a monster, god, or a messenger acting on one’s behalf. Such blessings are rare, but those fortunate enough to receive one gain the luxury of choosing a specific art. For most, however, they must make do with whatever abilities they develop naturally.

The process typically involves discovering the right means of conjuring, identifying one’s primary element, and understanding how it behaves. Many aspiring students of the archaic arts are dealt a limited hand, their abilities useful only for a few specific tasks and little else.

Writers block. Next bot gonna be related to schizophrenia.
creator: Goose_Man
